data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to New Residential Mortgage Loan Trust 2026-NQM5 (NRMLT 2026-NQM5)
data.description: New York-based credit rating agency KBRA has recently assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage-backed notes from New Residential Mortgage Loan Trust 2026-NQM5 (NRMLT 2026-NQM5). This transaction is valued at $471.1 million and falls under the non-prime RMBS category. The sponsor of this transaction is Rithm Capital Corp., which was previously known as New Residential Investment Corp. Rithm is a publicly traded real estate investment trust listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RITM. The mortgages underlying this deal were mainly originated by NewRez LLC (47.4%) and Champions Funding, LLC (21.2%).

data.title: nVent Electric plc to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 1
data.description: On April 17, 2026, nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT), a renowned provider of electrical connection and protection solutions worldwide, announced that it is scheduled to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Friday, May 1, 2026.

data.title: Trump wants extension in lawsuit against IRS over tax returns, as Justice Dept. fails to respond, posing conflict for govt lawyers.
data.description: The lack of response from the Justice Department to the president's lawsuit has resulted in a conflict of interest for the government's legal team.

data.title: Plaza Retail REIT Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
data.description: Fredericton, New Brunswick - Plaza Retail REIT (TSX: PLZ) will be hosting a live conference call on May 14, 2026, at 9:00 am EDT to discuss their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The call will also include senior management offering insights into Plaza's results. The financial statements and management's discussion and analysis for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, will be released before the call and accessible on Plaza's website (www.plaza.ca) under Investor Relations, and on SEDAR+ (www.sedarplus.ca). Interested participants are welcome to join the conference call to learn more about Plaza's financial status and performance.

data.title: Scientists replicate Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings using GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6, costing less than $30 per scan.
data.description: Researchers successfully replicated Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings using GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 within an open-source framework, all at a cost of less than $30 per scan.

data.title: Why Galaxy Digital Shares Are Charging Higher On Friday?
data.description: Galaxy Digital Inc (NASDAQ: GLXY) stocks are experiencing a significant surge today as part of a broader trend of positivity within the digital asset sector. The Nasdaq has seen a 1.38% increase, and the S&P 500 is up by 1.40%. The recent rise in market optimism is attributed to progress towards a potential ceasefire in the Middle East. Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi announced the opening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial vessels today, coinciding with the peace efforts in Lebanon. This news has led to a positive sentiment in the markets, sparking a sector-wide crypto rally. Cryptocurrency prices have also responded positively to the geopolitical developments, with Bitcoin also experiencing a bounce. For more details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin's value surge boosts Strategy Shares as holdings turn profitable, nearing $61B in worth.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.2%, with a total of 9.8 million people currently out of work. This marks a significant rise from the previous month's rate of 6.5%. The government has announced plans to implement new initiatives to address this spike in unemployment and boost job creation. Additionally, the report highlighted that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 15% compared to last year.Experts are concerned about the impact of this trend on the economy and are calling for urgent action to support those affected by unemployment.

data.title: Turkcell Files Its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Turkcell (NYSE: TKC, BIST: TCELL) has submitted its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 17, 2026. Interested parties can access the Company's Form 20-F and fully audited financial statements via the following link: https://www.turkcell.com.tr/en/aboutus/investor-relations/quarterly-results. Printed copies of the audited financial statements are also available at no cost upon request.

data.title: SPDR Issuer State Street Clocks Record Fee Revenue, Stock Soars
data.description: Shares of State Street Corp. (NYSE: STT) saw an increase on Friday following the announcement of their first-quarter results, which exceeded expectations. The bank reported adjusted earnings of $2.84 per share, surpassing analysts' predictions of $2.63. Additionally, their revenue spiked by 16% year over year to reach $3.796 billion, outperforming the estimated $3.658 billion. Fee revenue experienced a 15% rise, fueled by overall growth across the company. Servicing fees went up by 11%, management fees by 23%, and foreign exchange trading by 29%. Software services also saw a 7% increase, while securities finance revenue had a modest 2% gain. CEO Ron O'Hanley expressed his satisfaction, mentioning, "We achieved record quarterly fee revenue, net interest income, and total revenue, which led to significant year-over-year positive operating leverage and pretax margin expansion, excluding notable items."

data.title: Trump is requesting an extension in his lawsuit against the IRS regarding his tax returns. The Justice Department has not responded.
data.description: There has been no response from the Justice Department to the lawsuit filed by the president, leading to a conflict of interest for the government's legal representatives.

data.title: Full Sail University Alumni Named 2026 Grand Prize Winners of the Nationwide Coca-Cola Refreshing Films Competition
data.description: Angel Quinapallo and Kylie Shouse, alumni of Full Sail University, clinched the top spot in the 2026 Coca-Cola Refreshing Films competition, a renowned national platform for up-and-coming filmmakers. The winners were announced on April 17, 2026, in Winter Park, Florida. This achievement marks a significant success for the duo and showcases their talent to a wider audience.

data.title: Satellite Boom Launches STMicroelectronics Stock Into Orbit
data.description: STMicroelectronics is benefitting from its involvement in the surge of low-earth-orbit communications satellites, resulting in a boost for the company. The stock of STM received an upgrade due to this development, indicating favorable prospects for the company in this sector. This growth in the satellite industry is propelling STMicroelectronics' stock performance, positioning it for positive momentum.
